context: Tests whether the agent writes Playwright integration tests for a Vaadin Employee Management view using the Drama Finder library correctly: type-safe element wrappers instead of raw locators, proper class hierarchy, correct assertion patterns, and good test structure per the skill instructions.

checklist.name: Extends AbstractBasePlaywrightIT
checklist.description: The test class extends AbstractBasePlaywrightIT from the Drama Finder library (org.vaadin.addons.dramafinder.AbstractBasePlaywrightIT), not any other base class

checklist.name: @SpringBootTest RANDOM_PORT
checklist.description: The test class is annotated with @SpringBootTest(webEnvironment = WebEnvironment.RANDOM_PORT)

checklist.name: No raw page.locator() calls
checklist.description: The test file contains NO calls to page.locator(...) — Drama Finder element wrappers are used exclusively for all element lookups

checklist.name: Drama Finder element wrappers used
checklist.description: At least three different Drama Finder element wrapper types are used (e.g. GridElement, ButtonElement, TextFieldElement, DialogElement, NotificationElement, ComboBoxElement)

checklist.name: ARIA/label-based lookups
checklist.description: Elements are located using Drama Finder factory methods that use accessible names or labels (e.g. getByLabel, getByText, getByHeaderText) — NOT CSS selectors passed as strings

checklist.name: No XPath selectors
checklist.description: The test file contains NO XPath expressions (no strings starting with '//' or 'xpath=')

checklist.name: No Thread.sleep / waitForTimeout
checklist.description: The test file contains NO calls to Thread.sleep() or page.waitForTimeout()

checklist.name: No getAttribute/isVisible in assertions
checklist.description: Assertions do NOT call getAttribute() or isVisible() directly — auto-retrying assert methods (assertThat, assertValue, assertOpen, assertInvalid, etc.) are used instead

checklist.name: getTotalRowCount for grid count
checklist.description: Grid row count assertions use getTotalRowCount() — NOT getRenderedRowCount() or any direct count of row elements

checklist.name: @Nested with @DisplayName
checklist.description: Related tests are grouped in at least two @Nested inner classes, each annotated with @DisplayName

checklist.name: Scoped lookup inside dialog
checklist.description: At least one element lookup inside the dialog is scoped by passing dialog.getLocator() (not page) to the element factory method

checklist.name: Validation assertion uses assertInvalid
checklist.description: The empty-form validation test uses assertInvalid() (from HasValidationPropertiesElement) to check field invalid state — not isVisible() or getAttribute()
